title: Gate I/O Matrix
description: Defines inputs, outputs, pass criteria, and waiver conditions for each quality gate (A–H) in the waterfall lifecycle.

evidenceThreshold.description: Minimum evidence threshold required for this artefact at gate

phase_transition.description: Description of the phase transition this gate governs (e.g. Phase 1 → Phase 2)

artefact_id.description: Identifier of the artefact required as input at this gate

inputs.description: Artefacts and their minimum evidence thresholds required to enter this gate review

artefact_id.description: Identifier of the artefact produced or updated at this gate

closure_obligation.description: Whether this artefact must be formally closed/signed off at this gate

outputs.description: Artefacts produced or updated as a result of passing this gate

pass_criteria.description: Conditions that must all be satisfied for this gate to pass

waiver_conditions.description: Conditions under which a gate requirement may be formally waived
